sp.speaker: Worm Queen
sp.speech: I'm afraid, sister. Your Continuity grows near.

sp.speaker: Elder Queen
sp.speech: Hush, worm. Let the beasts do their work.

sp.speaker: Worm Queen
sp.speech: But the dreamers have awakened. They will come for us.

sp.speaker: Elder Queen
sp.speech: Yes, they will... like the answer to a prayer.

xml.info: Investigate the Reservoir on Lua: Zeipel, Lua

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: Tenno? Are you alright? Your Somatics output seems high.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: I... just... nodded off. It's nothing.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: Good. Deploy a Warframe to Lua. My sentries have gone silent. We may have an intrusion.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: On it.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: It was here Margulis put you into the dream, tried to heal you... tried to give you the strength to tame the Void within you. In a way, this is where you, where all Tenno, were born.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: But we weren't born here, were we?

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: No. When the Zariman was found adrift, the Orokin did everything they could to erase their mistakes. Transit recordings, personnel logs... everything was wiped out. The only thing they kept was... you.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: I'm detecting an unknown signature further ahead. Find out who it is and what they're doing.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: I just saw the intruder... moving fast. I think it's Teshin.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: Teshin? What is he doing here? It looks like he's heading to a Reservoir. Follow him.

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: Leave now. This doesn't concern you, child.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Don't call me that. What are you doing here?

sp.speaker: Elder Queen
sp.speech: Bring them to me.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: What was that?

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: The Queens.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Queens?! The Grineer Queens? Tell me what--

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: I am warning you. You think you're safe behind this metal, but you're not. Not in the ways that matter here. Behind this, you're still just a child --

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Stop saying that.

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: Follow me again, Tenno, and you will answer to my sword.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: I thought the Queens were just an invention of Grineer command. No one has ever seen them in the flesh.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: I have a feeling Teshin has. Can you track him?

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: Not with Specters masking him. But Tenno, we don't know anything about the Queens. Maybe Teshin alone should--

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: No. Teshin's not going to tell me what I can and cannot do. I'll take out his Specters so you can track him.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: I have a lock on his route. Exfiltrate when you're ready.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: Teshin is trying to mask his location from us, but I have pinpointed a suspicious signal for you to investigate. Find him, we need answers.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: All my scans for Teshin have converged on this location. Find him.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Why hasn't he reached out to us? If he is pursuing the Queens, we can help him.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: Pride or shame, he does seem to have some connection to them. Stay on the trail. Finding the Queens could give us a tactical advantage against the Grineer.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Understood.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: I've picked up the trail again.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: That's not Teshin, it's another one of his Specters. He's trying to shake us off the trail. Capture that Specter, we can use it to find the real Teshin.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: Well done. Return to your ship, I will alert you when I've decrypted this Specter's control signature.

xml.info: Pursue Teshin into the Asteroid Field: Naga, Sedna

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: Teshin's Specter points to what should be an unpopulated asteroid field, but deep scans show the presence of a security-matrix. Someone is trying to hide something, I need you to find out what. Prepare your Archwing.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: Something is hiding in this asteroid field but before you can investigate you need to disable the security matrix. Ordis, are you certain this is the best angle of approach?

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: Well, outside this corridor lie burst scanners, severe radiation, proximity mines, --GRINEER DEATH BEAMS-- so yes, Ordis recommends staying within the shipping corridor.

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: Operator, watch that transport ahead. The scanner is only able to scan one side at a time. You can use that to your advantage.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: You heard Ordis. Keep the transport between yourself and the beams. Do not let them touch you.

xml.infoMarked: As the player progresses through the scanners

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: They're going to scan the top of the transport, get below it.

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: Another scanner, to the right of the ship.

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: Watch out, to the ship's left, another scanner.

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: sigh of reliefThis is the last scanner.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: Nicely done. They still haven't seen you.

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: You're clear.

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: Yes. Might I say that was smooth, Operator.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: You're through. Land at the checkpoint.

xml.infoMarked: If player runs into a scanner

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: You've been detected. They know you are here.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: This checkpoint is the central hub of the security matrix. Shut it down so Ordis can fly you in undetected.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: They're coming for you. Don't let them abort the shutdown.

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: Ordis no longer detects any security.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: Good, but we can't take any chances, silence the remaining Grineer.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: You are in the clear. Keep moving.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Are you seeing this?!

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: staticIt must be the Queens' Fortress.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Are those Fomorian engines mounted on an asteroid? No wonder we've never been able to find it. It's always moving.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: staticExcellent, Tenno. Now get out of there. We'll need to analyze the intel you've gathered before our next move.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Negative. I'm heading in for a closer look.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: staticThere is a lot of Transference distortion in this area. I recommend we abort this mission and wait for Teshin to reach out.

xml.info: Boarding the Kuva Fortress will restrict mission access. Commit?

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: If the base moves again, we'll lose this opportunity. I'm going in.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Fine. I'll head back to the Orbiter, but the base won't be here for long.

xml.info: Infiltrate the Grineer Asteroid Fortress: Dakata, Kuva Fortress
xml.infoMarked: This transmission on the Orbiter can only be heard it if the player chooses to delay boarding the Fortress. Otherwise, it loads the next mission without putting the player into the Orbiter.

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: Operator, if you must enter the Queens' Fortress, you'll need to hurry, it could disappear at any moment.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Massively fortified. The Queens have to be here. I'm going to infiltrate the base.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Lotus, are you receiving me?

sp.speaker: Elder Queen
sp.speech: We're so glad you came.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Lotus? If you can hear me, something's tampering with the Transference stream. I'm going to locate the source.

sp.speaker: Queens
sp.speech: We have a gift for you.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: I know this place.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Teshin?!

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: You shouldn't have come here. You've ruined us both.

sp.speaker: Elder Queen
sp.speech: Well done, Teshin Dax.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Teshin Dax... you're with them?

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: I have come, as you commanded, my Queens.

sp.speaker: Worm Queen
sp.speech: And this is your offering? My sister needs the orphan child, not its Infested puppet.

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: The child? For what purpose?

sp.speaker: Worm Queen
sp.speech: laughsTo eat it, of course!

sp.speaker: Elder Queen
sp.speech: Hush worm! Do not question your Lords, Teshin Dax. Bring me the orphan. Bring me my Yuvan.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: ENOUGH!

sp.speaker: Worm Queen
sp.speech: gaspHow rude!

sp.speaker: Elder Queen
sp.speech: Oh, it's not their fault, worm. Mommy and Daddy weren't around long enough to teach them any manners. laughWe will have to.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Ordis! What is this?!

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: A Transference surge, Operator! You're losing your Warframe connection!

sp.speaker: Elder Queen
sp.speech: You have some idea that you're invincible, don't you? Nestled away in that mad Cephalon's crib-

sp.speaker: Elder Queen
sp.speech: But you belong to me now. For you see, child, we conceived of these ugly, metal cysts.

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: Operator! Cut the link!

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: I... I can't!

sp.speaker: Elder Queen
sp.speech: We gave you your precious gifts. And now, just as easily, we take them all away!

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: CUT THE LINK! Transference overload in 5... 4... 3...

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: Great job, Ordis. Ship Cephalon? More like Ship Fail-bot. When the Operator needed you most you --

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Ordis, enough.

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: Operator?! By stars! Don't do that to me. I am sorry I do not know what happened. Please, command me to self-destruct. Let me start it for you... commencing self-destruct in 5--4--3--2--

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Stop... uh... what's with the music?

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: Isn't it great? I can lead you through some breathing exercises...

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Just... just turn it off! Get the Transference power back on, okay? I lost my Warframe.

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: I've been trying. You may need to do your uh... Tenno thing again. Re-energize it, you know, with your... Void stuff!

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: I-I can't. It's... gone.

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: What? Gone? Are you sure? How will you command the Warframes if your --Conditions satisfied. Engaging Purge Precept.--

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Purge? Purge what?! Ordis?! What the hell?!

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: --You no longer possess Transference. You no longer command the Warframes. You no longer are the Operator. You must be purged from this vessel.--

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: Non-operator, I'm sorry to inconvenience you, but I'm going to decompress the ship now.

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: Former Operator, Ordis cannot keep missing like this! Get out of here before --I Purge you.--

xml.infoMarked: If the player doesn't progress towards the navigation console quickly enough

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: Ex-Operator, if you get to the navigation console, I may be able to detach the landing craft before I... before I kill you.

xml.infoMarked: As player progresses towards the navigation console

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: --You are not the Operator. You will be purged.--

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: --Exterminate! Exterminate the non-Operator.--

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: Operator! Cut the link... cut the link!

xml.info: Various panting and breathing sound effects

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Ugh... What happened to you?

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: They gave up.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: You... you betrayed me, you Infested piece of--

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: Yes, do it.

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: As I thought. The hard way, then.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: So the great Teshin is just a dog... fetching the Queen's stick wherever she throws it.

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: I warned you. Now you're trapped inside this place with the Queens burrowing in. Now I am forced to undo what Margulis did, to open the gates... and make you suffer.

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: Margulis lied to you, a lie of omission. She did not cure the Zariman children - she erased them. My only hope is that truth still lingers inside you, buried within your mind. The power and the misery... of the Void.

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: The Ayatan Sculptures are perpetually in motion, monuments of Orokin Continuity... immortality. But this one is halted and aging, needing you, as the Queens do. Will you give in to them? Or will you face the coil?

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: I remember...

sp.speaker: Elder Queen
sp.speech: Mother takes your hand and says there's been an accident. But don't worry, angel, you're safe with me. Her eyes are distant, unfocused...

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: She's lying.
She's lying.

speech.infoMarked: struggles to remove bone that stabbed into their leg

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: Beware the ravenous Golden Maw!

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Why does it have to be ravenous?

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: The Queen burrows into your mind just as the creature worms beneath your feet. With each step, you will discover what Margulis took from you. With each step, pain awaits you.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: I can't even remember her face.

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: Your past has weathered Margulis' manipulation. It lurks here, your only hope of surviving the Queens.

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: Destroy this barrier and go deeper into your past.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Sounds great, Teshin.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: The air was acrid and still.

sp.speaker: Elder Queen
sp.speech: The biomes had been sabotaged. The food stocks dwindled. Paranoia gripped your father's mind. What was it he said - as he stared out into the starless black?

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Something's out there, kiddo... watching us.
Something's out there, kiddo... watching us.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: The whole ship went insane.

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: You exist on the fold between two worlds. The world we know, of blood and steel, and the world that watches and dreams, the Void. Charge across the fold as you once did.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Incredible. And I was kicking myself for not bringing a rope.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: I smell... smoke.

sp.speaker: Elder Queen
sp.speech: Fires rage on the lower decks. Blood shimmers in the fitful light. Hunting parties roam the ship. But there is singing and laughter and play... for all the children have come together. Their minds, somehow unbent. You wipe away your tears, thinking-

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: This is my family now.
My family now.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: They tore her apart.

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: The Queen is nearly through. She knows what you did, giving her resolve. Now, you must master the fold. Walk upon its edge, concealing your movement within the shadows you create.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Shadows I create. Another Teshin metaphor, right?

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: I can hear them...

sp.speaker: Elder Queen
sp.speech: The grownups are howling at the door... drowning mad in the Void ocean but you... you are at ease swimming within the depths! You remember then how the howling stopped - they had broken through.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: I held out hope we'd be rescued. So I avoided the bloodshed.
I held out hope.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: They had lost their minds. I didn't blame them. We build a makeshift prison.
They had lost their minds.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: They were nothing but animals by then. So I hunted.
So I hunted.

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: Your repressed power has returned, fused with your Tenno abilities, amplifying them. You've outgrown the cradle. Now your Transference is innate. Control these Orokin beasts and escape this prison.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Control them? Like a Warframe?

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: Know this Tenno, that I am a Dax. A soldier of a lost era, the last of my kind. By Orokin hands we Dax were given great power, great strength... but an even greater weakness.

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: To obey their command. To never defy the Kuva, the Scepter, the symbols of their dominion. No Dax can ever raise steel against an Orokin. Only you can do that.

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: A Yuvan theater, long abandoned. In ages past, I would have stood guard as the young and exotic were paraded through the mountain pass and marched by the viewing pane. They'd barter here, the Orokin. Withering and coughing- as they prepared for their Continuity.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: She doesn't want me dead.

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: No. The Queen doesn't want to kill you. She wants to become you. To burrow through your mind corrupting it with despair until only she remains.

sp.speaker: Elder Queen
sp.speech: No crew aboard, only the children... only the parricidal monsters they had become. The endless Void, the gazing abyss, the bottomless ocean of horror... it coiled itself around your tender heart.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: I hated it.
I hated it.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: I controlled it.
I controlled it.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: I embraced it.
I embraced it.

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: CUT THE LINK!

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: CUT THE LINK! Transference overload in 5...4...3...2...1

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: Operator? Is that... is that 'you'? Your brain activity flat-lined for a moment there... Can you speak? By stars, the Operator's mind is destroyed?!!

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: I... I'm fine. Just... just don't play any music. I need to think.

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: Music? ...Operator you are not making sense! The Transference surge must have affected you as well. Try to rest while I begin repairs.

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: Understood. The Operator does not like music.

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: Hmm... this is odd. The circuits are dead but I'm detecting Transference energy... coming from... coming from you?!

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: Amazing. How are you doing this? It is slightly terrifying if I'm honest.

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: Operator, my sensors have gone dark. Where are you?

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: Oh. There you are! Impressive. Very useful. Ordis is a little afraid right now.

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: Operator, you'll breach the hull! Please restrain yourself.

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: Have you lost your mind?

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: No. But I've lost my Warframe... and Teshin... what if the Queens know that he helped me escape? I have to go back.

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: Impossible! Just as you thought, the base has moved again. We don't know where it is. There's no way back.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: My Warframe. It's still there.

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: Haven't you been listening? The Transference system is fried!

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: I don't need it anymore.

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: Operator, where are you going? Don't leave meeeeee...

sp.speaker: Elder Queen
sp.speech: What did you do, Dax? What did you do?! How did a child reject the Continuity?

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: Forgive me, my Queens.

sp.speaker: Elder Queen
sp.speech: We hold the Scepter! We command you. We are--

sp.speaker: Worm Queen
sp.speech: Sister! The dreamer's come for us!

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: Tenno, no! After everything you've endured to escape, why did you come back?

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: I came back for you.

sp.speaker: Elder Queen
sp.speech: Stupid child. You don't give up, do you? But coming here in the flesh? That was a big mistake. Guards! Kill this Warframe and bring me my new skin!

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: The Guardians protect the braids, the braids protect the Queen.

xml.infoMarked: Teshin will go through following lines one at a time if the player didn't use Transference. Once he says all three, he stops talking, and the hint to use Transference appears on the screen.

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: Tenno, this is one fight your Warframe cannot win.

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: Remember the mountain. Remember your new strength.

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: It's time to show the Queens what they have awoken within you.

xml.infoMarked: After using Transference, Teshin will switch to a new list of lines. Once he reaches the third, he will keep on repeating it until player uses Void Sling on the Kuva Guardian.

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: Their weapons contain Kuva, it protects them from your Warframe but not from your Tenno powers.

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: They are protected by the Kuva in their weapons. Find a way to disarm them.

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: Tenno, remember the Golden Maw and how you brought it to heel.

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: Let the Guardians feel your pulse from the Void.

xml.infoMarked: Once player uses Void Sling on the Guardian.

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: They're vulnerable. Attack.

xml.infoMarked: Keeps on repeating once the player defeats the first Guardian and until they destroy a braid.

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: The red braids shield her. Destroy them!

sp.speaker: Elder Queen
sp.speech: Shut up you insolent Dax!

sp.speaker: Elder Queen
sp.speech: Guards! Kill this Tenno!

sp.speaker: Elder Queen
sp.speech: Long enough have I lived in this ugly Grineer bodies. I need new flesh... I deserve new flesh! Yours! Guards! Kill this Warframe and bring me my new skin!

sp.speaker: Elder Queen
sp.speech: By my Orokin blood, I command you, Teshin Dax, to kill this Tenno.

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: No, I cannot.

sp.speaker: Elder Queen
sp.speech: You must. By your oath eternal.

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: That child I met on the mountain will surely die here.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: That child is gone.

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: I can show you no mercy, show me none in return.

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: Yes! From the moment I began training you, I have anticipated this moment.

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: You must not stop, defeat me.

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: You are a child no longer.

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: I am beaten.

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: I... Cannot go... On...

sp.speaker: Elder Queen
sp.speech: We are Orokin! We created you! We are your Golden Lords!

sp.speaker: Elder Queen
sp.speech: Come out, come out, little demon.

xml.infoMarked: These four exchanges will keep on cycling until the Queen is defeated.

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: Without her Sceptre , she is powerless. Break her shields and use your dash to steal it.

sp.speaker: Elder Queen
sp.speech: You'll pay for that.

sp.speaker: Elder Queen
sp.speech: I see now, how you cast me out. Simple, really. There's no room for me in that wicked, swarming head of yours.

sp.speaker: Elder Queen
sp.speech: Is this how you hunted the Zariman crew? Is this how you murdered your parents?

sp.speaker: Elder Queen
sp.speech: Show yourself you little coward.

sp.speaker: Elder Queen
sp.speech: What are you waiting for, Dax?

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: A chance to kill you... and now I finally have it.

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: Shall I, Tenno?

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: No. Let her rot. That will be her sentence.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: No. I will do it.

sp.speaker: Queen
sp.speech: No! NO! AHHH

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Kill her.

sp.speaker: Queen
sp.speech: No! NO! AHHH

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: The Worm has rallied the troops. Get to your ship. I'll divert them. Go!

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: Tenno? Tenno? I've been trying to get through. Are you... alright? Your Transference stream seems different, stronger.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: We have neutralized the Queens. Teshin... Teshin helped me. I'm heading to extraction now.

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: The Queens... they cut me off... I should have been there for you. I'll signal Ordis to pick you up right away.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Understood.

sp.speaker: Worm Queen
sp.speech: Beast! Get that thing! Don't let it escape!

sp.speaker: Worm Queen
sp.speech: Where do you think you're going skin suit? I have plans for you, delicious plans.

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: Thank the stars you're safe Operator! I forbid you to leave the Orbiter like that again, it's just too much for an old Cephalon like me.

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: You rescued your Warframe! What a relief. But... Ordis wonders, are you still able to walk the ship as... yourself?

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: Impressive! Just think of the possibilities! You can help me clean up that Infested door!

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: A mother wants to shield her child from the evils of the world. Margulis didn't lie to you. She protected you.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: But isn't it better I know the truth? Wouldn't you want to know? Teshin said--

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: Teshin thinks he knows better. Maybe he does? Maybe you needed to know to survive the Queens. But you are changed now.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: That's what you have to say? That I'm 'changed'?

sp.speaker: Lotus
sp.speech: What you did. You didn't have a choice. Tenno, you were only just a--

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Don't. Don't do that. Don't make excuses for me.

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: What's this? An Old War beacon? How exciting, Operator. You will want to investigate this... Oh. I'm sorry... did I interrupt?

xml.info: Return to the Mountain Pass: Earth

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: You don't know what to do with it.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: Tell me.

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: Hmm... Some believe the Kuva within is the blood of the Orokin Ancestors. An elixir of power... of immortality.

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: Others believe it to be a poison, a corrupting oil that brings madness and evil.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: What do you believe?

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: I believe them both. But for you, Tenno, perhaps this Kuva is just a symbol. That what you choose to do will define you more than anything.
You mad at me, kiddo? Did you forget? You owe me.
Don't forget, kiddo... you're nothing without me.
Hey, kiddo, what took you so long?

sp.speaker: Teshin
sp.speech: The world weighs more heavily on you now. Try not to lose yourself, Tenno.

sp.speaker: Operator
sp.speech: I won't.

xml.message: “ A child no longer On icy mountaintop a child, cold and scared met an old man, the prisoner of a poison oath. For the child, a frozen death would have been a peaceful end. Instead, they fought on and found a fire within themselves, a way to light the path ahead. The old man was a traitor. He deserved death, but the child was wise and merciful, and freed him from his burden. With that, the child left the cradle behind and they became more than a Tenno, they became themselves. Tenno, if you can find a way to forgive this old man's deception, to trust him again, then he will be forever be in your service. —Teshin Dax ”
xml.infoMarked: Attachments: Broken Scepter, Orvius Blueprint, Veiled Primary Riven Mod, Grineer Queens Glyph, The War Within Choice Scene
xml.message: “ A Space to Make Your Own It’s time we made some changes around here. ” —Ordis

sp.speaker: Ordis
sp.speech: Operator, Ordis has been thinking. Now that you are here in the flesh, we should make the Orbiter more comfortable. Ordis has identified an old storage space you could use. Stand by while I --TORCH THIS JUNK-- dispose of my old belongings. Out with the old and in with the new, right, Operator? Construct this Domestic Habitation Segment to extend life support to your new room.

xml.message: “ A Gift From The Past That Is Yet To Be From the immeasurable skein of fate, woven unseen from infinite collisions between choice and outcome, action and reaction, cause and effect, a single object has been delivered into my possession. And soon, from my possession to yours. You come to Cetus. You find a door like no other. You show that door your true self. That door opens. Behind that door, I await you. From my possession to yours sweeps this single object, this impossible product of infinite choices - a singular thing intended solely for you. To Cetus. To the door. ”
xml.info: After completing The War Within, being Mastery Rank 5, and owning a Railjack
xml.message: “ Spare the Rod Tenno are such arrogant, undisciplined children! Mommy Lotus might spare the rod, but not ME! Every siphoned drop of the Old Blood makes my fortress grow stronger. Sweet, sweet Kuva! Be on your best behavior, little one. You KNOW what you did to my sister. My Kuva Liches can make sure you get what you deserve! Your Undying Queen ”
xml.info: After completing The War Within and Call of the Tempestarii, and being Mastery Rank 5
xml.message: “ Corporate Machinations Operator, During a routine electromagnetic wave sweep, a most distressing message was intercepted on the Corpus network. Ordis hopes nothing comes of this murderous consortium, or rather, board meeting. Do be careful. Your loyal Cephalon, Ordis ”

“ Lua Stirs [PLAYER NAME], Lua has felt my touch as I have felt its in return. Rescuing Lua - and you - from the Void may be changing this place. The Void stirs and shakes Lua to its core... exposing ancient halls long since abandoned. Smelling possible treasure, the Grineer Worm Queen ordered her troops to descend upon these newly exposed halls. They were instantly Corrupted by its long dormant Orokin Neural Sentry. The secrets that lie buried here are yours, not theirs. Infiltrate the Yuvarium and Circulus, survive the Corrupted and we will claim those secrets together. Lotus ”
